name: O.R.C. Northern Scorpion Jr.
description: The O.R.C. Northern Scorpion Jr. is the militarized juvenile version of the Northern Scorpion. It is still smaller than the adult, but it already pressures like a real front-line hunter.
behavior: It patrols caves and O.R.C. points on short routes, mixing quick claw attacks with aggressive burrows. It is more mobile than the adult and far more persistent than its size suggests.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and tries to stay glued to you at all times. It does not last as long as the adult, but it compensates with mobility and how easily it can restart pressure after burrowing.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually accompanies larger O.R.C. scorpions and functions as a mobile pursuer to close gaps in the line.
strategy: Busting damage and hits on the stinger remain the most efficient way to bring it down. Do not get lazy when it burrows, because if it reappears beside you it can restart the whole pressure loop.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Claw Slash: 50. 2-Hit Combo: 35. 4-Hit Combo: 43.75. Charged Hit: 68.75. Burrow Strike: 75.

abilities.name: Claw Slash
abilities.description: A quick claw strike used to begin close-range pressure.

abilities.name: 2-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A short sequence meant to catch slow reactions and keep you blocking.

abilities.name: Charged Hit
abilities.description: It delays the claw for a moment and then hits forward with much more force.

abilities.name: Burrow Strike
abilities.description: It burrows and reappears near the player to continue pressure without giving up distance.
